summary_en: 645,100 shares (1.36% of outstanding) acquired for ¥349.6M (¥542/share) via ToSTNeT-3 on 2026-05-21. Program completed. Cumulative execution within authorized limit of 650,000 shares and ¥352.3M.
title_en: Notice Regarding Results of Acquisition and Completion of Acquisition of Treasury Shares via Off-Exchange Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Japan Creative Platform Group (ticker 7814, TSE Standard Market) completed a treasury share acquisition via off-exchange trading (ToSTNeT-3) on 2026-05-21. The company acquired 645,100 shares (1.36% of outstanding shares, excluding treasury) for a total of ¥349,644,200 at ¥542 per share. This execution fell within the board-authorized limit set on 2026-05-20 of up to 650,000 shares for a maximum of ¥352,300,000. The acquisition was undertaken to improve capital efficiency and enable flexible capital policy execution in response to changing business conditions. The program has now been completed as of 2026-05-21.
